creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: Remove the second site listed in MASTER_SITES as its stale (by quite a bit), you might also convert the port to DISTVERSION as recommended by Porter's Handbook while at it. Not sure if it matters all the much but according to the source it's not related to GNU autotools, https://github.com/NetworkConfiguration/dhcpcd/blob/master/configure (GNU_CONFIGURE)
